product_type: In-Ground Hydraulic Line Layout for 2-Post Lift

dimensions.through_slot_purpose: Through slot for underground hydraulic tubing

installation_requirements.through_slot: 1 3/4 inch wide x 1 1/2 inch deep through slot for underground hydraulic tubing
installation_requirements.reference: For further information, see General Floor Requirements in Installation Manual

specifications.title: Suggested In-Ground Hyd. Lines
specifications.revision_A: Redrawn & Replaced, 10/93, by dok, approved RW
specifications.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or X-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: In-ground hydraulic line routing between lift columns
Through slot in concrete slab for underground hydraulic tubing
Identical layout to LC-12 inground drawing
notes: Drawing is identical to LC-12 inground layout but labeled for LMF-12 model
Unless otherwise specified, surface finish to be 125 RMS
Welding medium shall conform to AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or X-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only
For further information, see General Floor Requirements in Installation Manual
